global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with geometric shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching with a subscription service.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: A simple logo positioned at the top, featuring the text 'MoonScreen' in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of circular and rectangular shapes in a lighter shade of purple, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: Two smaller circular shapes in a lighter hue, adding visual interest to the center of the ad.

elements.label: Overlapping shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape overlapping with the main geometric shapes, contributing to the design's complexity.

elements.label: Binge starts now text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Binge starts now' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Cancel anytime text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message reads 'Cancel anytime', providing additional information.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Book now' in white, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalistic with bold text, MoonScreen logo, binge starts now message, Book now CTA
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
